attacking_style: Launches explosive attacks inside final 600m on uphill finishes, timing moves precisely when favorites hesitate and mark each other. Exploits domestique status to remain unmarked before late kicks.
team_tactics: Functions primarily as pace-setter for team leader (Pinot), using domestique role for tactical invisibility before personal opportunities. Works in service until final moments allow opportunistic moves.
terrain_preference: Slight uphill finishes requiring short, powerful efforts. Excels on gradient kicks inside final kilometer where positioning and timing trump sustained climbing power.
vulnerability: Role as domestique limits personal ambitions; primary tactical vulnerability is team duty constraining freedom to attack earlier or more aggressively.
key_patterns: Attacks inside 600m to go on uphill finishes when leading favorites mark each other (2 observations)
Leverages domestique invisibility to avoid pre-marking before launching late race-winning moves (2 observations)
Shows superior finish timing awareness, attacking when favorites hesitate rather than on raw power (2 observations)
Balances team pacing duties with opportunistic personal attacks in final kilometers (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated race-winning form with perfectly timed attack and continued strong pacing performance day following victory
